target.label: packages/devbox/ absorb from cc-devbox — image + compose + substrate tooling access (M0.5 a-c)

recommendations.action: Accept WAIVED posture — four P2 ACs cover an infrastructure-smoke substrate story (first of its class) with no live test runner at 1.0. AC 1 + AC 2 + AC 3 + AC 4 all have STRONG substrate evidence: Task 7 four-check structural bundle (entrypoint.sh forbidden-pattern grep exit 1, Dockerfile pin-rationale header first-content, docker compose config exit 0, git ls-files 100755 for entrypoint.sh + benchmark.sh) + Task 4.1 iter-123 image bake persistence (keel-devbox:local sha256:e7e91f1537f196b39f32ae6168d33bb33fd58b76cc7a9a53582800ff4038f7a2, 847,527,165 bytes ≈ 848 MB, linux/arm64). All structural smokes re-verified LIVE at iter-126 trace-time — byte-identical image ID, grep exit 1, compose config exit 0, 100755 bits. AC 3 dynamic runtime (compose run pnpm test/lint) + AC 4 cold/warm benchmark RUNS are scope-clarification-consistent operator-owned carve-outs under backend-B iteration-context per iter-124 bind-mount denial root cause (host Docker Desktop File Sharing allowlist vs worktree path); substrate deliverables (script + safety gate + measurement method + README § Pending first bake doc) all landed. Per-AC runner-hosted coverage deferred to Story 2.1-test-runner-landing (Epic 13 scope) + operator-workstation follow-up runs (AC 3 compose-run verification + AC 4 authoritative cold + warm benchmark).

Story 2.1 authors the M0.5 (a)+(b)+(c) deliverable substrate (Dockerfile + docker-compose.yml + entrypoint.sh + scripts/benchmark.sh + VERSIONS.md + expanded README.md) + substrate-level files supporting the iteration-context DinD contract (docs/invariants/devbox-dind.md + packages/keel-invariants/src/invariants.manifest.ts entry INV-devbox-dind-available + INVARIANTS.md anchor + AGENTS.md + RALPH.md cross-references). Any silent edit to devbox-dind.md triggers sync-gate FAIL at pre-commit per Story 1.9 drift detection. Downstream consumers: Story 2.6 wraps the raw docker compose invocations in `pnpm devbox:*` lifecycle CLI; Story 2.11 extends workspace mount parameterization for shared-workspace mode; Epic 6 Story 6.5 `pnpm rls:explain` consumes the baked psql + delta + workspace bind-mount per VERSIONS.md § Epic 6 forward-compat roster.

Story 2.1 test-runner landing (Epic 13 scope) will unlock optional per-AC probes: AC 1 structural-shape smokes (file existence + comment-header regex); AC 2 Playwright install-deps completeness check (diff against upstream playwright.dev list) + baked-version sanity (docker run --rm keel-devbox:local <tool> --version at operator workstation); AC 3 compose run pnpm test/lint exit-0 check (operator-workstation or backend-A CI harness); AC 4 benchmark.sh cold + warm wall-clock assertion against NFR2 budget (M4-Pro native or backend-A DinD). None of these block Story 2.1 `review → done` transition under the WAIVED precedent — substrate evidence at iter-126 is complete for the in-iteration-executable portion of the story.
Run /bmad-testarch-test-review to assess test quality (no tests exist — no-op; recorded for parity with downstream pipelines).
